# PERF-86 positive: c.JSON allocates an encoder per response
lang: go
file: PERF-086-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

type User struct {
	ID   int64  `json:"id"`
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func GetUser(c echo.Context) error {
	u := User{ID: 1, Name: "x"}
	return c.JSON(200, u)
}
